response.justification: Bogdan has extensive experience at top-tier tech companies (Google, Meta) with a strong background in scalable systems, distributed architectures, and high-performance services. While his experimentation experience isn't explicitly detailed, his work on growth-oriented projects (e.g., Direct Mail automation at Meta, Geo-Data platform) and multi-team initiatives suggests alignment with the role's core responsibilities. However, his resume lacks explicit mention of experiment design, A/B testing frameworks, or AI-driven growth systems, which are key for this role.
strengths: Proven track record at Google and Meta, demonstrating ability to work at enterprise scale with distributed systems
Strong software engineering fundamentals with hands-on coding, architecture, and mentorship experience
Experience building platforms used by multiple teams (e.g., Geo-Data platform, investment tools at RIDE Capital)
concerns: Limited explicit experience with experimentation frameworks, A/B testing, or growth measurement systems
No direct mention of AI tool usage to accelerate engineering velocity, which is a preferred qualification
Most recent role (Google) is very brief (April 2025–Present), making it hard to assess current relevance
